name: Turkey Reuben Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces sliced cooked turkey breast (skinned before cooking and not salted)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread mustard evenly on each slice of bread. Place one turkey slice on two bread slices. Top each with a cheese slice, 2 tablespoons sauerkraut, and a slice of rye bread.
2. Coat a large skillet with cooking spray; place over medium heat until hot. Add sandwiches, and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side or until the bread is evenly toasted. Serve immediately.
